top3.sql:
SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE ex.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%'
  AND ex.cost > 50
  AND ex.cost < 100;

SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE ex.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%'
  AND ex.cost > 50
  AND ex.cost < 100;

SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date
FROM event e
INNER JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
INNER JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE LOWER(ex.expense_description) LIKE '%pizza%'
  AND ex.cost BETWEEN 50.01 AND 99.99;

SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date
FROM event e
INNER JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
INNER JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE ex.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%'
  AND ex.cost BETWEEN 51 AND 99;

final.sql:
SELECT e.event_name, e.event_date
FROM event e
JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event
JOIN expense ex ON b.budget_id = ex.link_to_budget
WHERE ex.expense_description LIKE '%pizza%'
  AND ex.cost > 50
  AND ex.cost < 100;
